summary: Chroma Paints frontend smoke pass. 15/15 effective flows working after correcting two test-script selector mismatches. One minor spec drift found (tile-gallery-items vs requested tile-gallery) and one spec drift (gallery-item-{id} vs requested gallery-tile). All public + admin core flows functional.
passed: Home loads with hero + nav links (Products, Colors, Gallery, Contact)
WhatsApp FAB visible on public pages (whatsapp-fab)
Products list renders 6 cards; filter-category-interior + filter-finish-matte clickable and apply
Product card click navigates to /products/{id} detail page
Colors page renders 20 color cards; color-family-greens filter works
Gallery renders 4 tiles; lightbox opens and lightbox-close dismisses it
Contact form: inquiry-name + inquiry-phone + submit -> inquiry-success screen appears
Admin login at /admin/login with seeded creds succeeds, redirects to /admin
Admin overview tiles render (tile-products, tile-colors, tile-gallery-items, tile-inquiries)
Admin Products: create-product opens drawer; form-name+category+finish+image+save creates product and row appears
Admin Inquiries: public-submitted inquiry visible in admin list
Admin Inquiries: status select (native <select>) updates to in_progress and toast 'Updated' shown
Admin logout clears session and returns to /admin/login

failed.issue: AdminOverview tile for gallery uses data-testid='tile-gallery-items' (label='Gallery items') while the test request expects 'tile-gallery'.
failed.evidence: Actual testids on /admin: ['tile-products','tile-colors','tile-gallery-items','tile-inquiries']. Source: /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOverview.jsx line 27 label 'Gallery items' -> testid generated from label.

failed.issue: Gallery tiles use data-testid='gallery-item-{id}' while the test request mentions 'gallery-tile'. Lightbox + lightbox-close testids match spec.

action_items: Optional: rename AdminOverview gallery tile to data-testid='tile-gallery' (or change label to 'Gallery') for consistency with spec.
Optional: rename Gallery tile testid to 'gallery-tile-{id}' for consistency with spec.
Neither blocks first-finish — both are naming consistency only; underlying flows fully functional.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on functional flows; 2 LOW naming drifts
